name: Highlight Cutter
description: Upload a long video and AI picks 3-10 highlight moments and cuts them automatically. Designed for users who don't know how to use video editing software.

description_i18n.zh: 上传一段长视频，AI 找出 3-10 段精彩瞬间并自动剪好。专为不会用剪辑软件的小白。
description_i18n.en: Upload a long video and AI picks 3-10 highlight moments and cuts them automatically. Designed for users who don't know how to use video editing software.

author: OpenAkita
